<<<KOT:postmodernist>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"postmodernist denotes a follower or advocate of postmodernism, which is a meta-philosophical and meta-artistic stance (skepticism toward grand narratives, rejection of universal truth, emphasis on social construction of meaning). These are second-order epistemological and cultural positions that require formal philosophical vocabulary and reference to belief systems about knowledge and interpretation. The prime lexicon contains no predicates for philosophical stance, meta-narrative critique, or cultural movement affiliation. It cannot be grounded in concrete actions, percepts, or kinds of people identifiable by bodily features or ordinary activities."}
<<<END:postmodernist>>>>

<<<KOT:pyrene>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"pyrene is a polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon defined by its precise molecular structure (C₁₆H₁₀, four fused benzene rings, peri-fused arrangement) and chemical identity. Its individuation depends entirely on organic chemistry: molecular formula, ring topology, and spectroscopic properties. The prime lexicon has no terms for chemical compounds, molecular structure, atoms, bonds, or the periodic table. Pyrene cannot be distinguished from other PAHs or identified by sensory or macroscopic properties alone; it requires technical chemical knowledge. This belongs to the chemistry sector, not the everyday perception tier."}
<<<END:pyrene>>>>
